# Ekiverere Promise Edesiri (Mr. Promise) - Portfolio

## About
Ekiverere Promise Edesiri, also known as Mr. Promise, is a Software Engineer and the Founder & CTO of Heavstal Tech. Based in Nigeria, he specializes in developing infrastructure that solves and simplifies real-world problems. He enjoys working at the intersection of software architecture, engineering, and design, where great UX meets clean, scalable code.

## Current Role
Founder & Chief Technology Officer (CTO) at Heavstal Tech (https://heavstal.com.ng). He leads system design and backend engineering, shaping the engineering strategy covering authentication, APIs, and core infrastructure.

## Featured Projects
1. Heavstal Tech Platform: Central platform providing access to Heavstal services.
2. Heavstal Auth: Africa-built OAuth 2.0 & OIDC identity provider.
3. Heavstal Docs: Documentation hub for Heavstal products.
4. Heavstal Bots: Automation-focused platform for auth codes.
5. Verselor V1: WhatsApp-based automation platform featuring an AI assistant named Gideon.
6. MediSphere: Blockchain-powered ecosystem making healthcare accessible.

## Tech Stack
- Languages: JavaScript, TypeScript, HTML5, CSS3, SQL
- Frameworks: React, Next.js, Astro, Tailwind CSS, Node.js, Express, Bash
- Infrastructure & DBs: Supabase, MongoDB, Redis, AWS, Custom APIs
- Tools: Git, GitHub, Linux, Cloudflare, Vercel, Docker
